name: discrawl
description: Private Codex workflows for Discrawl local Discord archive search, sync, wiretap DMs, SQL diagnostics, Git snapshots, reports, and remote archive reads.

interface.longDescription: Focused Codex skills for using Discrawl to search local Discord archives, check freshness, import Discord Desktop cache messages, inspect local DMs, run read-only SQL, publish or subscribe to private Git snapshots, browse the TUI, generate reports, and read Cloudflare remote archives.
defaultPrompt: Check Discrawl freshness and repair sync state.
